_comment: English strings pass through unchanged - this file documents available keys

Title: Title

Tip: jot down a quick list before record: Tip: jot down a quick list before recording
You have 30-60 seconds. Sketch 5-6 bulle: You have 30-60 seconds. Sketch 5-6 bullet points in the text area first so you have a mental map:
Key tasks or priorities for today: Key tasks or priorities for today
Anything else on your mind for the day: Anything else on your mind for the day
Optionally mention if you're feeling on/: Optionally mention if you're feeling on/off track, and whether you'll be mostly available or heads-down focused today.
